title: Nokia Q2 profit climbs 18% as AI data-centre demand doubles cloud sales
summary: Nokia reported comparable operating profit of €434mn for the second quarter of 2026, up 18% on the same period last year and comfortably ahead of the €382mn that analysts polled by LSEG had forecast.
caption: output/2026-07-23/nokia-q2-profit-climbs-18-as-ai-data-centre-demand-doubles-cloud-sales.txt
